title: Write ferrum_extlib_toml.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_toml: TOML 1.0 parser/serializer. Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: parse to dynamic value type and to typed structs via derive, serialize Ferrum structs to TOML, parse errors with line+column, round-trip key order preservation, integration with CLI config file loading, serde-style derive macros or trait-based.
